name: Kuppan, Baskaran
resolved_employer: Persistent Systems (Baskaran 'Basky' Kuppan) - IT services / digital engineering
evidence: ZoomInfo and LinkedIn both list a Baskaran 'Basky' Kuppan at Persistent, matching the filer's self-reported employer 'Persistent Systems' and occupation 'IT Leader'; the Buffalo Grove, IL 60089 address is consistent with Persistent Systems Ltd's Chicago-area delivery presence. IMPORTANT AMBIGUITY: two unrelated firms use this name - Persistent Systems Ltd/Inc. (Indian-origin IT services and digital engineering, the likely employer here) and Persistent Systems LLC (New York-based maker of Wave Relay military MANET radios, a defense contractor). The 'IT Leader' occupation and Illinois location point to the IT services firm, not the defense contractor, so no military-defense flag is recorded. Could not open the LinkedIn/ZoomInfo profiles directly to confirm title and exact entity, hence medium.

name: Cunningham, Haden

Searches of LinkedIn, the Lakeway residents directory and Austin-area news found no Haden Cunningham in 78734 who could be corroborated by school, age or address; the LinkedIn 'Haden Cunningham' found works for the Colorado Cattlemen's Agricultural Land Trust and there is a youth athlete by the same name, neither matched to Lakeway. Notable but unresolved: 12 FEC donations with a fully Democratic lean (1.0) is a heavy federal giving history for someone reporting as a student.

name: Oliver, Guy
resolved_employer: V&S Enterprises, LC (Austin real estate/property holding) and MTG Management, Inc. d/b/a Major Brand Gasoline - president
evidence: Corporationwiki lists Guy Oliver as president of MTG Management, Inc. at 3267 Bee Caves Rd, Austin 78746 - the same address as V&S Enterprises, LC (3267 Bee Cave Rd Ste 107), the employer he self-reported, and Vicki H. Oliver (president/director of V&S Enterprises) is listed as sharing companies with him. His self-reported occupation 'Real Estate' matches V&S Enterprises' recorded activity as an Austin property owner and general contractor. Medium rather than high because no source names Guy Oliver as an officer of V&S Enterprises itself; the link runs through the shared address and the shared associate. AI-generated aggregator profiles (Elementix) claim he holds 36-108 properties across 13 holding companies with $330M-$679M in mortgage exposure, but the figures are mutually inconsistent across their own pages and were not relied on.

name: Richards, Zach
resolved_employer: Brown Note Productions, Inc. - Director of Integration (Austin & Denver)
evidence: Zach (Zachary M.) Richards is Director of Integration for Brown Note Productions' Denver and Austin locations, hired to lead its AVL (audio/video/lighting) systems-integration division; he previously spent 22 years at Big House Sound, 11 of them as Director of Installations. Self-reported occupation 'Audio Engineer' and employer 'Brown Note Productions' match exactly, and Brown Note opened its Austin integration office in 2019, consistent with the Austin 78757 address. Trade press credits him on the Austin Stone Church AV build. Heavy Democratic federal giving history (223 FEC donations, lean 1.0).

name: Edwards, Mark
evidence: Not identifiable, and the self-reported title does not check out. The filing claims 'Chief Revenue Officer' at 'Trinet' (Austin 78716), but TriNet Group's CRO in 2022 was Alex Warren (appointed November 2022, previously SVP Customer Experience), succeeded by Shea Treadway in 2024 - no Mark Edwards appears in TriNet's executive record. The one Mark Edwards found who has held CRO titles works at HomeStory Rewards (previously Vast/Vroom), not TriNet, though he holds a UT-Austin marketing degree. He may hold a regional or divisional revenue role at TriNet's Austin office, or the employer string may be a different 'Trinet' entirely; neither could be confirmed. No FEC history to corroborate. Do not classify.

name: Allen, Sled
resolved_employer: El Patio (Austin Tex-Mex restaurant, est. 1954) - third-generation manager/owner; co-founder of El Patio Foods
evidence: Sled Allen is the third-generation manager of El Patio, the Guadalupe St Tex-Mex restaurant open since 1954 and the oldest Austin restaurant still in its original building; he returned from a job with the Denver Nuggets to run day-to-day operations when the family reopened it in September 2019. Self-reported occupation 'Restauranteur' and employer 'El Patio' match exactly. With first cousin Jeff Attal Jr. he founded El Patio Foods in 2021, jarring the restaurant's salsa for retail (Tiny Grocer, Thom's Market, Spec's statewide). Family: grandson of Lubbock-raised songwriter/sculptor Terry Allen; his and Attal's uncle is Charles Attal, co-founder of ACL Fest promoter C3 Presents.

affiliations.role: Third-generation manager of the restaurant; co-founder of the retail salsa venture

name: Berber, Jake
evidence: Industry follows the filer's own disclosure ('MBA Student', employer 'None'), which is unambiguous regardless of identity. The likely person is the Jake Berber who sits on the board of the A Glimmer of Hope Foundation alongside Philip and Donna Berber (its co-founders) and Ryan and Shane Berber - the family is Austin-based and the Westlake-area 78746 ZIP is consistent, but no source states Jake Berber's age, school or address, so the match rests on surname plus family location and is not confirmed. Philip and Donna Berber endowed the foundation with $100M from the sale of online trading firm CyBerCorp to Charles Schwab and were ranked #7 on Barron's '25 Best Givers' in 2010. No FEC history.
